summary: Iteration 18 - Mode Toggles Testing Complete. All features working correctly: Backend API returns enable_online, enable_offline, enable_in_person fields with correct defaults. Admin Panel shows 3 mode checkboxes with descriptions in program form and mode badges in program list. Homepage shows conditional badges (Online/Offline/In Person) and disclaimer when no programs have in_person enabled. Enrollment and Cart pages show only enabled mode buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: models.py: Program model has enable_online=True, enable_offline=True, enable_in_person=False defaults - correct
AdminPanel.jsx: 3 checkboxes with data-testid (toggle-mode-online, toggle-mode-offline, toggle-mode-in-person) and descriptions
AdminPanel.jsx: Program list shows mode badges using conditional rendering based on enable_* fields
ProgramsSection.jsx: Badges use bg-blue-500 (Online), bg-purple-500 (Offline), bg-emerald-500 (In Person) with correct conditional logic
UpcomingProgramsSection.jsx: Same badge logic and disclaimer
EnrollmentPage.jsx: ParticipantRow receives enabledModes prop, shows only enabled mode buttons with descriptions
CartPage.jsx: CartItemCard respects item.enable_online, item.enable_offline, item.enable_in_person from CartContext
CartContext.js: Stores enable_online, enable_offline, enable_in_person when adding items to cart
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mode toggles feature complete. All programs have enable_online=true, enable_offline=true, enable_in_person=false by default. Admin can modify these per program. Frontend shows badges conditionally. Disclaimer shows when no program has enable_in_person=true. CartContext correctly stores mode toggles when adding items.

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response field 'mock_otp' for testing

backend_api.GET /api/programs: PASS - Returns enable_online, enable_offline, enable_in_person for all programs
backend_api.GET /api/programs/{id}: PASS - Returns mode fields for single program
backend_api.POST /api/programs: PASS - Creates program with correct default mode values (online=true, offline=true, in_person=false)
backend_api.PUT /api/programs/{id}: PASS - Updates mode toggles correctly and persists to database

admin_panel.program_form_mode_checkboxes: PASS - 3 checkboxes visible with descriptions (Online='Live session via Zoom', Offline='Remote healing, no in-person', In Person='Future use')
admin_panel.program_form_default_values: PASS - Online and Offline checked by default, In Person unchecked
admin_panel.program_list_mode_badges: PASS - Shows blue 'Online', purple 'Offline', gray 'In Person' badges based on enabled modes
admin_panel.edit_program_mode_loading: PASS - Mode checkboxes correctly populated when editing existing program

homepage_badges.programs_section_badges: PASS - Program cards show 'Online (Zoom)' blue badge, 'Offline (Remote)' purple badge
homepage_badges.upcoming_section_badges: PASS - Upcoming cards show same conditional badges
homepage_badges.disclaimer_when_no_in_person: PASS - Shows 'All sessions are conducted online via Zoom or through remote distance healing — no in-person sessions at this time.' when no programs have enable_in_person=true

enrollment_page.conditional_mode_buttons: PASS - Shows only enabled modes (Online/Offline buttons shown, In Person hidden when disabled)
enrollment_page.mode_button_descriptions: PASS - Online='via Zoom', Offline='Remote, no in-person'
enrollment_page.no_in_person_note: PASS - Shows italic note 'All sessions are online via Zoom or remote distance healing — no in-person sessions at this time.'

cart_page.mode_buttons_from_context: PASS - Cart items show only enabled mode buttons based on item.enable_online/offline/in_person from CartContext
cart_page.no_in_person_when_disabled: PASS - In Person button not shown when item.enable_in_person=false

cart_context.stores_mode_toggles: PASS - When adding item to cart, stores enable_online, enable_offline, enable_in_person from program data
